    <item>
        <guid>nba526559</guid>
        <title>Jalen Brunson: Scores 32 in loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jalen-brunson-4405</link>
        <description>Brunson logged 32 points (13-22 3Pt, 4-7 3Pt, 2-4 FT), five rebounds and five assists in 36 minutes during Sunday's 111-100 loss to the Thunder.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 29 Mar 2026 7:40:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526558</guid>
        <title>Miles McBride: Doesn't return Sunday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/miles-mcbride-5402</link>
        <description>McBride (undisclosed) exited Sunday's 111-100 loss to the Thunder in the third quarter and did not return, finishing with zero points (0-3 FG, 0-3 3Pt), one rebound, one assist and one block in 11 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 29 Mar 2026 7:24:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526556</guid>
        <title>Alperen Sengun: Full stat line in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/alperen-sengun-5404</link>
        <description>Sengun supplied 36 points (12-23 FG, 5-7 3Pt, 7-8 FT), 13 rebounds, seven assists, three steals and three blocks across 32 minutes in Sunday's 134-102 win over the Pelicans.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 29 Mar 2026 6:43:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526555</guid>
        <title>Peyton Watson: Starting Sunday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/peyton-watson-5722</link>
        <description>Watson will start Sunday versus the Warriors.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 29 Mar 2026 6:34:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526554</guid>
        <title>Miles McBride: Exits to locker room</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/miles-mcbride-5402</link>
        <description>McBride exited to the locker room in the third quarter of Sunday's game against the Thunder due to an apparent groin issue, Stefan Bondy of The New York Post reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 29 Mar 2026 6:30:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
